testcase.name: test_empty_client_id_returns_400
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_transaction_validation.py:97: in test_empty_client_id_returns_400 assert response.status_code == 400, f"Expected 400, got {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Expected 400, got 422 E assert 422 == 400 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_valid_transaction_creation_succeeds
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_transaction_validation.py:286: in test_valid_transaction_creation_succeeds assert response.status_code in [200, 201], f"Expected 200/201, got {response.status_code}: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 200/201, got 400: {"detail":"Possible duplicate: Similar transaction created 2026-03-21T10:25:46.636131+00:00 (Transaction ID: tx_fcdafa588122). Wait 5 minutes or use a unique reference."} E assert 400 in [200, 201] E + where 400 = <Response [400]>.status_code
